chunks.text: my family sat at the kitchen table and began to talk about our hobbies.
Everyone has something in their free time.
My favorite hobby is reading books.
When I enter a story, I forget the time.
My sister loves painting and singing.
My brother enjoys collecting old stamps.
“ This one was from Grandfather,” he said, showing each one with care.
After finishing dinner, I often begin reading my favorite book.
Enjoying a hobby with my family is a very important time for me.
